view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a waitlist queue with position is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a waitlist queue with position is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of a waitlist queue with position. The evidence from the prior step 'customer-join-waitlist-flow' confirms that a customer has entered the waitlist with a queue ID and entry status indicating they are waiting. This directly supports the requirement that the system maintains a waitlist queue with position, as it includes specific identifiers and statuses related to the queue.
